list.name: game_code
list.label: Game
list.query: SELECT game_code AS __text, game_code AS __value FROM games ORDER BY started_ts DESC LIMIT 200

targets.rawSql: SELECT status FROM games WHERE game_code = '$game_code'
SELECT (round_num || ' / target ' || target) AS rnd FROM live_games WHERE game_code = '$game_code'
SELECT player_count FROM games WHERE game_code = '$game_code'
SELECT total_rolls FROM games WHERE game_code = '$game_code'
SELECT count(*) FROM rounds WHERE game_code = '$game_code' AND winner_user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT extract(epoch from (coalesce(ended_ts, now()) - started_ts))::int AS age FROM games WHERE game_code = '$game_code'
SELECT coalesce(name, user_id) AS metric, matched AS value FROM live_players WHERE game_code = '$game_code' ORDER BY matched DESC

SELECT ts AS time, coalesce(e.user_id, 'unknown') AS metric, (payload->>'matched')::int AS value FROM events e WHERE e.game_code = '$game_code' AND e.type = 'roll' AND e.round_num = (SELECT round_num FROM live_games WHERE game_code = '$game_code') ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time, CASE type WHEN 'roll' THEN coalesce(payload->>'name','?') || ' rolled ' || (payload->>'matched') || '/10 (target ' || (payload->>'target') || ')' WHEN 'round_won' THEN '🏆 ' || coalesce(payload->>'name','?') || ' won round ' || (payload->>'round_num') || ' in ' || (payload->>'roll_count') || ' rolls (' || round(coalesce((payload->>'duration_ms'),'0')::numeric/1000,1) || 's)' WHEN 'round_started' THEN '▶ Round ' || (payload->>'round_num') || ' started — target ' || (payload->>'target') WHEN 'round_ended' THEN '⏹ Round ' || (payload->>'round_num') || ' ended' WHEN 'game_created' THEN '🎲 Game created by ' || coalesce(payload->>'name','?') WHEN 'game_started' THEN '🎮 Game started — ' || coalesce(payload->>'player_count','?') || ' players, target ' || coalesce(payload->>'target','?') WHEN 'game_ended' THEN '🏁 Game ended' WHEN 'player_joined' THEN '👋 ' || coalesce(payload->>'name','?') || ' joined (' || coalesce(payload->>'player_count','?') || ' players)' WHEN 'player_left' THEN '🚪 ' || coalesce(payload->>'name','?') || ' left' WHEN 'reconnected' THEN '🔄 ' || coalesce(payload->>'name','?') || ' reconnected' WHEN 'rate_limited' THEN '⚡ Rate limit — ' || coalesce(payload->>'dt_ms','?') || 'ms since last roll' ELSE type END AS message, CASE type WHEN 'round_won' THEN 'info' WHEN 'game_started' THEN 'info' WHEN 'game_ended' THEN 'info' WHEN 'player_joined' THEN 'debug' WHEN 'player_left' THEN 'warning' WHEN 'rate_limited' THEN 'warning' WHEN 'round_started' THEN 'debug' WHEN 'round_ended' THEN 'debug' ELSE 'trace' END AS level FROM events WHERE game_code = '$game_code' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT round_num AS "#", target AS "Target", coalesce(ps.name_last, r.winner_user_id) AS "Winner", r.duration_ms AS "Duration (ms)", r.total_rolls AS "Rolls" FROM rounds r LEFT JOIN player_stats ps ON ps.user_id = r.winner_user_id WHERE r.game_code = '$game_code' ORDER BY r.round_num DESC
SELECT 'R' || round_num::text AS "Round", total_rolls AS "Rolls" FROM rounds WHERE game_code = '$game_code' AND winner_user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY round_num

SELECT ts AS time, 'R' || e.round_num || ' ' || coalesce(payload->>'name','?') AS metric, (payload->>'matched')::int AS value FROM events e WHERE e.game_code = '$game_code' AND e.type = 'roll' ORDER BY ts

SELECT rp.round_num AS "Round", coalesce(ps.name_last, rp.user_id) AS "Player", rp.rolls AS "Rolls", rp.matched_at_end AS "Final matched", rp.time_to_first_match_ms AS "First match (ms)", rp.avg_dt_between_rolls_ms AS "Avg dt (ms)", rp.fastest_dt_ms AS "Fastest dt", rp.slowest_dt_ms AS "Slowest dt" FROM round_player rp LEFT JOIN player_stats ps ON ps.user_id = rp.user_id WHERE rp.game_code = '$game_code' ORDER BY rp.round_num DESC, rp.matched_at_end DESC
SELECT val AS "Face", count(*) AS "Rolls" FROM events, jsonb_array_elements_text(payload->'rolled_values') AS val WHERE game_code = '$game_code' AND type = 'roll' GROUP BY val ORDER BY val::int

SELECT coalesce(ps.name_last, r.winner_user_id) AS "Player", count(*) AS "Wins", round(count(*)::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT count(*) FROM rounds WHERE game_code = '$game_code' AND winner_user_id IS NOT NULL), 0) * 100, 1) AS "Win %" FROM rounds r LEFT JOIN player_stats ps ON ps.user_id = r.winner_user_id WHERE r.game_code = '$game_code' AND r.winner_user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.winner_user_id, ps.name_last ORDER BY "Wins" DESC
SELECT ts AS time, type, coalesce(user_id, '') AS user, payload::text AS message FROM events WHERE game_code = '$game_code' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 200
